text.title: Release Planning Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: internal tooling or single team; use simpler release procedure
run release-train discipline with readiness matrix

text.example: applies=true -> one_shot=false -> run train discipline (rule release-train-cadence-fixed).
